_comment: Simplified NPC profile example - narrative-focused without combat stats
name: NPC Name
role: Role or occupation (e.g., innkeeper, merchant, guard)
_lineage_note: Optional subspecies/lineage (e.g., 'High Elf', 'Hill Dwarf', 'Fire Genasi'). Leave empty if not applicable.

ai_config._comment: AI uses centralized .env settings (model, base_url, api_key). Only override specific fields if this NPC needs different settings. Most NPCs can use 'enabled: false' and let story_manager handle their dialogue.
ai_config.system_prompt: Custom system prompt for this NPC's personality (optional)

voice._comment_voice_id: Piper voice identifier from game_data/piper/voices/. Available: en_US-joe-medium (male narrator), en_US-ryan-low (deep male), en_US-amy-medium (female)

voice_settings._comment: Optional voice adjustments. Speed: 0.5-2.0 (1.0 is normal). Pitch: -12 to +12 semitones. Volume: 0.0-1.0
